description_long: This guard rail features a robust, rectangular base constructed from what appears to be dark, weathered stone or concrete blocks, providing substantial stability. Rising from the base is a series of evenly spaced, vertical metal balusters, each with a slightly twisted profile, supporting a flat, horizontal top rail. The top rail is made of metal and runs the full length of the structure, offering a continuous barrier. The overall design is utilitarian, with a focus on durability and safety, suitable for urban environments such as sidewalks, parks, or the edges of elevated walkways. The ends of the rail are blunt, with no visible flaring or special end treatment. The color palette is dominated by dark grays and blacks, giving the guard rail a modern, understated appearance.
description: A sturdy guard rail with a dark stone or concrete base and vertical metal balusters supporting a flat metal top rail, finished in dark gray and black tones.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full length of the guard rail, with all vertical balusters and the rectangular base clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the narrow profile of the guard rail, emphasizing the thickness of the base and the alignment of the top rail.
description_view_2: Rear view, visually similar to the front, displaying the vertical balusters and the solid base.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the narrow profile and the depth of the base structure.
